settings.text: Pair text with an image to focus on your chosen product, collection, or blog post. Add details on availability, style, or even provide a review.

Mono.M began in a chemistry lab in New Jersey, USA - the first place founder Jill visited when returning to school after her 12-year successful marketing career. Watching molecules react and transform, she envisioned a brand where science and artistry would intertwine to bring her dreams to life.

Driven by a passion for capturing life's essence through both beauty and fragrance, we find inspiration in real stories. We celebrate personal journeys and those precious moments that transform the ordinary into extraordinary. Our team carefully crafts these cherished memories into home fragrances, infusing them with creativity, authenticity, and sensitivity.

We believe home scents are more than just fragrances.

Like a magazine filled with stories, each Mono.M scent tells its own unique tale. Our collection draws inspiration from the depth, complexity, and authenticity of everyday real life stories. Rich, layered fragrances, rather than simple notes, are our signature. In each scent, memories of the past intertwine with dreams of tomorrow. Beyond preserving memories, we hope create new ones with you.

Home is everything to us—our sanctuary where we dream, play, and find a sense of belonging.

With this in mind, everything in our home must be safe and reassuring. Our candles are hand-poured using only premium certificated ingredients: pure soy and soy-coconut wax, natural fragrance oils, and eco-friendly, lead-free cotton wicks.

Our candle vessels, crafted by professional artisans we carefully select, embody the warmth of true craftsmanship. Each vessel features an ergonomic curved design for a secure grip, combining elegance with functionality. The vessels stay cool and safe while being moved. This design reflects Mono.M's core concept: that everyone's unique characteristics and edges are beautiful.

We strive to reduce unnecessary consumption. The world has enough glass, ceramic, and plaster bottles - and you shouldn't have spent so much money on duplicates.

We achieve this through our textured, durable containers crafted by skilled artisans partners we have carefully selected, ensuring the highest quality products. We promote sustainability by offering one initial purchase with the option of refillable candles thereafter.

We recognize that super fancy packaging often serves as a marketing tactic to drive impulse purchases. However, this is not Mono.M's packaging strategy.We strive to balance aesthetics and environmental responsibility through our use of recyclable boxes and customized eco-friendly paper materials. Our commitment to sustainability and functionality drives us to stay current with the latest developments, aiming for 100% recyclability of all components. We continuously improve our packaging to minimize our environmental impact.

Mono.M brings together people who share similar values, aesthetics, and passions for fragrance and music. Through authentic sharing and meaningful conversations, we build lasting connections with our community. We believe in serendipity—that kindred spirits naturally gravitate toward each other.

A Mono.M membership is more than just a subscription—it's a monthly gift designed to spark joy, curiosity, and genuine connection from the moment you open your package. Please click on monom.club/subscription know more details.

As music lovers ourselves, the Mono.M team carefully curates quarterly and themed playlists that complement our original products. Light a Mono.M candle, play our specially selected music, and discover how these sensory experiences blend to create something magical.

"Our vision is to build a home fragrance brand that warms hearts, sparks joy, and prioritizes quality while championing sustainability. We are dedicated to enhancing the user experience and contributing to the protection of our global environment.“

— Jill Gao, Founder & CEO
